name: PhD Candidate
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research. References to a sequencing-related study and a colleague named Kelly. Working on a project with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition in his career.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must do things perfectly or not at all.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't meet expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of tasks due to fear of imperfection, leading to procrastination.
situation: Working on a PhD project and concerned about its progress.
auto_thought: I'm a loser for not completing tasks on time.
behavior: Procrastination and avoidance of tasks, leading to increased anxiety and feelings of inadequacy.
